common.endDateAfterStart: End date must be after start date.

auth.checkSpam: Can't find it? Check your spam or junk folder.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.invalidOtp: Please enter the code from your email.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.linkExpired: Your access code has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.noAccess: This account does not have access to any clinic. Please contact your administrator.
auth.otpExpired: This code has expired. Tap 'Use another email' and request a new one.
auth.otpDisabled: Code verification is not enabled. Please contact your administrator.
auth.verifyError: Could not verify the code. Please check it and try again.
auth.sendError: Could not send the code. Please try again.
auth.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a minute before trying again.
auth.unauthorized: You don't have permission to access this page.
auth.subtitle: Shift scheduling for IVF labs
auth.checkResetEmailDescription: We've sent a password reset link to {email}.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.setPasswordSubtitle: Create your password to get started.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.emptyWeekDesc: The generator considers shifts, minimum coverage, team preferences and absences. Ready in seconds.
schedule.rotaLocked: This rota is locked. Unlock it to make changes.
schedule.noRotaDescription: Generate a rota automatically or copy the previous one.
schedule.noRotaYet: The rota is not ready yet
schedule.noRotaYetDescription: Your manager will publish this week's rota soon.
schedule.preserveOverridesDescription: If you keep overrides, only unedited shifts will be regenerated.
schedule.constraintViolation: Cannot meet {skill} coverage on {date} — only {count} qualified practitioner available.
schedule.templateAppliedSkipped: Template applied. {count} assignments skipped (on leave or inactive).
schedule.noTemplatesDescription: Save a rota as a template first.
schedule.deleteWeekConfirm: Delete all assignments for this week?
schedule.deleteDayConfirm: Delete all assignments for this day?
schedule.coverageInsufficient: Insufficient coverage after change — consider regenerating the rota
schedule.copyPrevWeekConfirmBody: A draft rota will be created with last week's assignments. Staff on leave will be skipped.
schedule.noPrevAssignments: No assignments in the previous week.
schedule.noPrevDayAssignments: No assignments on the same day last week.
schedule.confirmRestoreMsg: Are you sure? Current shifts will be replaced.
schedule.strictTemplateDesc: Uses a saved template as a base. Assignments are copied exactly, respecting only approved leaves.
schedule.flexibleTemplateDesc: Uses a template as a starting point. The algorithm adjusts based on availability, rules and shift preferences.
schedule.templateApplyDesc: Apply a saved template. Assignments are copied respecting approved leaves.
schedule.aiOptimalDesc: Generates the rota using the rules engine configured for this clinic.
schedule.taskOptimalDesc: Generates the rota by assigning tasks based on coverage, availability and configured rules.
schedule.aiHybridDesc: The engine builds a valid base rota, then Claude reviews and optimizes avoid days, fairness and rules. Best of both worlds.
schedule.hybridGeneratingDesc: The engine built the base rota. Claude is now reviewing and optimising preferences and rules.
schedule.aiReasoningDesc: Claude analyzes all constraints and generates the rota with step-by-step reasoning. Slower but may handle complex trade-offs better.
schedule.viewAiReasoning: View Claude's reasoning for this rota
schedule.claudeThinkingDesc: Evaluating constraints, coverage and team preferences. This may take 15-30 seconds.
schedule.blankWeekDesc: Start with an empty rota and assign shifts manually.
schedule.noTemplatesSavedHint: Save one from the calendar or go to Settings → Templates
schedule.confirm4WeeksDelete: Delete all assignments for the 4 visible weeks?
schedule.overwriteWarning: This will overwrite existing rotas for all 4 weeks.
schedule.generatingTimeout: Generation timed out. Please try again — Claude requests can take up to 2 minutes.
schedule.clickToSetTraining: Click to set as in training

staff.title: Team
staff.noStaffDescription: Add your first team member to start scheduling rotas.
staff.noResultsDescription: No members matched that name or filter.

fields.preferredShiftHint: Preferred shift — the scheduler will try to honor it without breaking minimum coverage.

contractTypeHint.part_time: Counts as 0.5 staff in coverage calculations. The exact weight is configurable in the admin panel.
contractTypeHint.intern: Counts as 0.5 staff in coverage calculations. The exact weight is configurable in the admin panel.

staff.onboardingEndDateHint: During this period the staff member is scheduled but does not count toward coverage minimums. The end date is automatically adjusted to the Sunday of that week.
staff.prefersGuardiaHint: This staff member volunteers for additional weekend on-call shifts when on-call mode is active.
staff.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. The member will be permanently removed.
staff.skillCycleHint: Click to cycle: off → training → certified
staff.inviteViewerLabel: Send viewer invitation — they will receive an email to create their account with read-only calendar access
staff.onlyInactiveDelete: Only inactive members can be permanently deleted.
staff.daysAvailableHint: Contracted days. The generator never assigns outside these days.
staff.daysPreferredHint: Days they prefer to work (within available). The generator tries to respect but may adjust.
staff.daysPreferredHint3: Tap to cycle: neutral → prefers → avoids. The generator respects preferences as hints, not hard constraints.
staff.noPreference: No preference — all available days are equal.

deactivateModal.description: They will be marked as inactive with today as the end date

hardDeleteModal.description: This action is irreversible. The entire record and all associated shift history will be deleted.

leaves.title: Leave
leaves.noLeavesDescription: No leave has been recorded for this period.
leaves.noPendingLeavesDescription: All leave requests have been reviewed.
leaves.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this leave record? This action cannot be undone.
leaves.conflictWarning: This period overlaps with other team members' leave.
leaves.notLinkedDescription: Your account is not linked to any staff member. Contact your manager to link it.
leaves.viewerRequestInfo: Your leave requests will be reviewed by a manager before being approved.
leaves.viewerApprovalInfo: Get manager approval before adding leave.
leaves.requestBanner: This request will be sent to your manager for approval.

lab.title: Lab

fields.punctionsByDay: Average pick-ups per day of the week
fields.adminDefaultShiftHint: Shift assigned to Admin staff unless they have an individual preferred shift set
fields.ratioOptimalHint: Above this value the indicator is green
fields.ratioMinimumHint: Below = red. Between minimum and optimal = amber
fields.ratioDescription: Certified embryologists per pick-up. Shown in the calendar header.
fields.firstDayHint: Affects column order in the calendar
fields.adminHint: Set 0 to not require admin that day
fields.proceduresDescription: Procedure forecast per day of the week.
fields.biopsiesFooter: Biopsies are calculated automatically from pick-ups 5 and 6 days prior (D5/D6), based on the conversion rate and distribution configured below.
fields.biopsyDescription: Biopsy forecast based on scheduled pick-ups.
fields.conversionRateHint: Percentage of pick-ups that result in a biopsy
fields.d5d6DistributionHint: Estimated split between day 5 and day 6 post pick-up
fields.coverageShiftFooter: Define how many people from each department you need per shift and day. Leave blank to not require a department on a specific day.
fields.coverageDeptFooter: The generator will not produce a rota that doesn't meet these minimums. Set 0 to not require a department on a specific day.
fields.disableShiftCoverageConfirm: Disable shift coverage? Saved values will be kept but not applied.
fields.disableTaskCoverageConfirm: Disable task coverage? Saved values will be kept but not applied.
fields.taskCoverageOverflow: Some tasks exceed the department minimum. Adjust the flagged values before saving.
fields.taskCoverageDisabledHint: The generator will use department minimums for all tasks. Enable this option only if you need specific exceptions per task.
fields.taskCoverageFooter: Define minimum coverage per task and day. Leave blank to not require coverage for a task on a specific day.

lab.holidaysHint: Regional bank holidays will be applied automatically when generating rotas.
lab.holidayModeDescription: Which coverage minimums apply on weekday bank holidays.
lab.holidayModeWeekdayHint: Bank holidays keep the usual Wednesday coverage levels.
lab.holidayModeSaturdayHint: Bank holidays use Saturday coverage minimums.
lab.holidayModeSundayHint: Bank holidays use Sunday coverage minimums.
lab.holidayReduceBudgetHint: Reduces each person's weekly budget by 1 day for each bank holiday in the week.
lab.daysOffDescription: Determines when staff days off are assigned.
lab.daysOffAlwaysWeekendHint: Days off are always Saturday and Sunday. Only on-call staff are assigned.
lab.daysOffPreferWeekendHint: Days off preferably fall on weekends, but staff can be assigned if needed.
lab.daysOffAnyDayHint: Days off are distributed evenly across all days of the week.
lab.daysOffGuardiaHint: Staff work Monday–Friday. Weekends are additional on-call shifts assigned on a rotating basis among volunteer staff.
lab.defaultDaysPerWeekDescription: Default working days per week for new staff and minimum headcount calculation.
lab.holidayReduceShiftsLabel: Reduce available shifts on public holidays
lab.holidayReduceShiftsHint: Reduces each person's available shifts by 1 day for each public holiday in the week.
lab.partTimeWeightHint: Fraction that each part-time staff member counts toward coverage minimums.
lab.internWeightHint: Fraction that each intern counts toward coverage minimums.

rules.title: Scheduling rules
rules.subtitle: Hard rules are absolute constraints. Soft rules generate warnings but do not block.
rules.noRulesDescription: Add rules to customize rota generation.
rules.errorMinTwoStaff: Select at least 2 people for this rule
rules.expiresAtHint: Optional — rule will be ignored after this date
rules.expiredRules: {count, plural, one {# expired rule} other {# expired rules}}

types.no_librar_mismo_dia: Do not be off same day

descriptions.no_coincidir: Selected members cannot coincide on the same day or shift
descriptions.no_misma_tarea: Selected members cannot be assigned to the same task/technique on the same day
descriptions.no_librar_mismo_dia: Selected members cannot both be off on the same day
descriptions.supervisor_requerido: The supervisor will always be assigned on the same day and shift as the selected staff
descriptions.max_dias_consecutivos: Limits the maximum number of consecutive days worked
descriptions.distribucion_fines_semana: Limits how many weekends per month a person can work
descriptions.descanso_fin_de_semana: If a person works one weekend, the next (or previous) is off, plus contiguous rest days
descriptions.no_turno_doble: Prevents assigning two shifts on the same day
descriptions.restriccion_dia_tecnica: Restricts a technique to specific days of the week
descriptions.asignacion_fija: Always assigns selected staff on specific days and/or shifts
descriptions.tecnicas_juntas: Assigns selected techniques to the same person
descriptions.tarea_multidepartamento: Requires staff from the specified departments on a task
descriptions.equipo_completo: Marks tasks as 'All' by day of the week (does not affect engine)

params.supervisorHint: Will be automatically assigned when supervised staff are working
params.recoveryFollowingHint: Works weekend N, off weekend N+1
params.recoveryPreviousHint: Works weekend N, must have been off weekend N-1
params.restDaysHint: Additional days off after the worked weekend
params.trainingTechniqueHint: Will automatically assign this technique to supervised staff
params.fixedDaysHint: If empty, applies every working day
params.linkedTecnicasHint: Select at least 2 techniques to assign to the same person
params.requiredDepartmentsHint: The task must have at least 1 person from each selected department
params.wholeTeamTecnicasHint: These techniques will be marked as 'All' in the schedule
params.coincideScopeDayHint: Cannot both work on the same day
params.coincideScopeShiftHint: Can work the same day but must be in different shifts

reports.title: Reports
reports.comingSoonDescription: Reports will be available in a future release.
reports.staffSummaryDescription: Shift distribution and absences per person
reports.taskCoverageDescription: Days with and without coverage per task
reports.startBeforeEnd: Start date must be before end date
reports.staffReportFooter: The report includes only staff active during the selected period.
reports.techReportFooter: A day is considered covered if at least one person was assigned to the task, regardless of number.
reports.extraDaysDescription: Staff who worked more days than contracted. Past months only.
reports.noExtraDays: No staff exceeded their day budget during this month.
reports.extraDaysFooter: Counts unique assigned days per week against each person's contracted days.
reports.confirmedLeavesDescription: List of approved leaves in the selected period
reports.noLeaves: No confirmed leaves in the selected period.
reports.leavesFooter: Only leaves with approved status are shown.
reports.swapRequestsDescription: All shift swap and day-off requests with approval timeline
reports.noSwapRequests: No shift change requests in the selected period.
reports.swapReportFooter: Shows all shift swap and day-off coverage requests regardless of status.

features.byShiftDescription: By shift — staff are assigned to shifts
features.byTaskDescription: By task — staff are assigned to procedures
features.contactSupport: Contact support to change the schedule mode.
features.leaveRequestsDescription: Allows staff to request leave and time off from the app
features.scheduleNotesDescription: Add daily notes at the bottom of the schedule (instructions, reminders)
features.taskInShiftDescription: Allows assigning tasks or sub-departments to each person within their shift. Enable only if your lab needs this level of detail.
features.authMethodDescription: Choose how users sign in to this organisation.
features.authMethodOtpHint: A 6-digit code is sent to the user's email each time they sign in.
features.authMethodPasswordHint: Users sign in with a password. Access codes available as fallback.

billing.managedByLabRota: Billing is managed by LabRota. Contact support for any changes.

implementation.importHistoricalDoneDesc: Import rota files to update team, shifts, or rules. A backup will be created automatically before applying changes.
implementation.importHistoricalSetupDesc: Configure your lab automatically from previous rota files.
implementation.importFutureDesc: Upload a file with already planned rotas to load them directly to the calendar.
implementation.staffCount: {count, plural, one {# active person} other {# active people}}
implementation.restartConfirmDescription: This action will delete all data: schedules, team, departments, shifts, tasks, rules, and regional configuration. Only the organization will be kept. This action cannot be undone.

leaveImport.title: Add leaves from file
leaveImport.description: PDF, Word, or Excel with leave information
leaveImport.fileReadError: Could not read the file. Please check it is not password-protected.
leaveImport.noLeavesDetected: No leaves detected in the file.

agent.title: AI Agent
agent.placeholder: Type a message… (e.g. Generate next week's rota)
agent.confirmDraftDescription: The agent is proposing the following changes. Review them before confirming.

examples.leave: Add a week of annual leave for Amira next month

examples.shifts: How many shifts has Amira done this month?

support.title: Contact support
support.subject: Subject
support.sent: Message sent. We'll get back to you soon.

tecnicas.allNeedNameCode: All tasks need a name and code.
tecnicas.loadDefaults: Load defaults (OPU, ICS, ET, BX, DEN, AND)

departments.loadDefaultsConfirm: This will replace current departments with defaults. Continue?

shiftTypes.startBeforeEnd: Start time must be before end time
shiftTypes.deleteShiftConfirm: This shift has {count} active assignments. Deleting will affect existing rotas. Continue?

plantillas.noTemplatesDescription: Save a rota as a template from the calendar to reuse it.

notes.defaultNotesDescription: Default notes that appear each week. They can be dismissed individually per week.
notes.notesDisabled: Notes are disabled. Enable them in Administration → Features.
notes.label: notes
notes.confirmDismiss: This is a default note. It will be removed only from this week and will reappear next week. Continue?

shiftRotation.title: Shift rotation
shiftRotation.description: Defines how shifts are assigned when there is no technique or personal shift preference.
shiftRotation.stableDesc: Same person, same shift each week
shiftRotation.weeklyDesc: Same shift all week, changes next week
shiftRotation.dailyDesc: A different shift each day within the week

taskRotation.title: Task rotation
taskRotation.description: Defines how tasks are rotated among staff across the week.
taskRotation.stableDesc: Same person, same task each week
taskRotation.weeklyDesc: Same task all week, changes next week
taskRotation.dailyDesc: A different task each day within the week

orgSettings.clickToChangeLogo: Click the icon to change the logo
orgSettings.regionalHint: The region determines which public holidays apply to the calendar.
orgSettings.leaveRequestsDesc: Allows employees to request leave from the app. Requires admin approval.

orgUsers.removeConfirm: Remove this user from the organization?

notifications.title: Publish notifications
notifications.description: Select who receives an email when a rota is published. Selected users and external emails will receive the full schedule by email.
notifications.emailFormatDesc: Choose how the rota is displayed in the notification email.
notifications.byShiftDesc: Rows are shifts, columns are days
notifications.byTaskDesc: Rows are tasks, columns are days
notifications.byPersonDesc: Rows are staff, columns are days

assignmentSheet.deleteDayConfirm: Delete all assignments for this day?
assignmentSheet.regenerateDayConfirm: Regenerate assignments for this day? Current assignments will be replaced.
assignmentSheet.pbTooltip:
P+B = Qualified Staff ÷ Procedures

{staff} qualified ({emb} embryologists + {andro} andrologists) ÷ {total} procedures ({pickups} pick ups + {biopsies} biopsies)

Only embryologists and andrologists count for the ratio.

Optimal: ≥ 1.0 · Minimum: ≥ 0.75

import.uploadHint: Upload 2 to 12 weeks of historical rotas for best results.
import.dropzone: Drag files here or click to select
import.dropzoneFormats: Excel (.xlsx, .xls), CSV, PDF or images (PNG, JPG)
import.extractingHint: Claude is extracting staff, shifts, techniques and patterns from your rotas.
import.reviewDescription: Review and edit the extracted information before importing.
import.name: Name
import.noRules: No rules detected in the provided files.
import.doneDescription: We imported {staff} staff, {shifts} shifts, {techniques} techniques and {rules} rules.
import.settingsDescription: Upload previous rota files to configure your laboratory automatically.
import.rotaModeByTaskHint: Common in large labs (10+ staff), where each professional is assigned to specific procedures each day.
import.rotaModeByShiftHint: Common in small labs (<10 staff), where the whole team rotates between shifts without fixed task assignments.
import.doneDescriptionWithSettings: We imported {staff} staff, {shifts} shifts, {techniques} techniques and {rules} rules. Coverage and parameters configured.

adminBackups.empty: No backups yet. Create one manually or wait for the system to generate an automatic one.

adminOrg.byTaskDesc: By task — common in large labs (10+ people)

swaps.selectType: What would you like to do?
swaps.noCandidates: No available candidates for this day
swaps.alreadyPending: You already have a pending swap request for this shift
swaps.onlyPublished: Swaps are only available for published rotas
